title: Wmontjoy
compiled_truth: Wmontjoy is an external contact at [Brunini](companies/brunini). Over the corpus period (2001-03-16 to 2001-06-11), Wmontjoy sent 16 and received 69 emails, totalling 85 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (16), [Drhunt](people/drhunt-watervalley) (1).
